journalist_toolkit.title: Journalist Toolkit
journalist_toolkit.snapshot: Fast-access reporting resources for sports journalists.

automation_status.purpose: Forces a visible file change every run so GitHub, Vercel and the live site do not stay frozen when upstream sports data is quiet.

focus: Main headline must be timely enough for the current sports desk
Older breaking/context items can stay lower but cannot dominate the homepage
Separate live newsroom and editor signal modules
Freshness gate for stale league reports
Source diversity across sports news links
ESPN used for game context, not as the only story source
